blended.narrative: Howelsen Hill is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,338 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
